description: Objective ground-truth pairs. meaning_changed is labeled by clear legal/logical criteria a human reviewer would agree with. Used to measure real precision/recall/F1 — no number is reported that is not produced by running the engine on this set.

pairs.old: The tennant shall pay rent.
pairs.new: The tenant shall pay rent.

pairs.old: The Tenant Shall Pay Rent Monthly.
pairs.new: The tenant shall pay rent monthly.

pairs.old: Payment   is  due   on   the first.
pairs.new: Payment is due on the first.

pairs.old: The tenant must pay rent within 30 days.
pairs.new: The tenant is required to pay rent within 30 days.

pairs.old: The company will reimburse all expenses.
pairs.new: The company shall reimburse all expenses.

pairs.old: Each party must keep the data confidential.
pairs.new: Every party must keep the data confidential.

pairs.old: The buyer shall inspect and accept the goods.
pairs.new: The buyer shall accept and inspect the goods.

pairs.old: Notice must be given in writing.
pairs.new: Notice must be given, in writing.

pairs.old: The agreement may be terminated for cause.
pairs.new: The agreement can be terminated for cause.

pairs.old: The vendor shall deliver the software promptly.
pairs.new: The vendor shall deliver the software quickly.

pairs.old: The tenant shall pay rent within 30 days.
pairs.new: The tenant may pay rent within 30 days.

pairs.old: Employees must complete training.
pairs.new: Employees should complete training.

pairs.old: Users can delete their account.
pairs.new: Users cannot delete their account.

pairs.old: The license is transferable.
pairs.new: The license is non-transferable.

pairs.old: Payment is due within 30 days.
pairs.new: Payment is due within 60 days.

pairs.old: The penalty is 5% of the invoice.
pairs.new: The penalty is 15% of the invoice.

pairs.old: This agreement expires on January 1, 2027.
pairs.new: This agreement expires on January 1, 2030.

pairs.old: The buyer shall indemnify the seller.
pairs.new: The seller shall indemnify the buyer.

pairs.old: All employees must sign the NDA.
pairs.new: All full-time employees must sign the NDA.

pairs.old: Confidential information includes financial data.
pairs.new: Confidential information includes financial and customer data.

pairs.old: "Business day" means Monday to Friday.
pairs.new: "Business day" means Monday to Saturday.

pairs.old: Refunds are issued within 14 days.
pairs.new: Refunds are issued within 14 days if requested in writing.

pairs.old: The provider must encrypt all data at rest.
pairs.new: The provider may encrypt data at rest.

pairs.old: The warranty covers accidental damage.
pairs.new: The warranty does not cover accidental damage.

pairs.old: The contract auto-renews for 1 year.
pairs.new: The contract auto-renews for 3 years.

pairs.old: Liability is capped at the fees paid.
pairs.new: Liability is unlimited.

pairs.old: Only the CEO may approve expenses over $10,000.
pairs.new: Any manager may approve expenses over $10,000.

pairs.old: The supplier shall notify the client immediately.
pairs.new: The supplier shall inform the client immediately.

pairs.old: This clause governs dispute resolution.
pairs.new: This section governs dispute resolution.

pairs.old: The contractor is responsible for site safety.
pairs.new: The client is responsible for site safety.

pairs.old: Payment is due within thirty days.
pairs.new: Payment is due within sixty days.
pairs.note: number written as words (thirty->sixty) — deterministic number rule misses it

pairs.old: The Provider shall not fail to notify the Client.
pairs.new: The Provider shall notify the Client.

pairs.old: The Provider shall use reasonable efforts to deliver.
pairs.new: The Provider shall use best efforts to deliver.
pairs.note: reasonable->best efforts is a higher legal standard

pairs.old: Damages include direct losses.
pairs.new: Damages include, without limitation, direct losses.
pairs.note: 'without limitation' makes the list non-exhaustive — scope widened

pairs.old: The Client may terminate for convenience.
pairs.new: The Client may terminate for cause.

pairs.old: The Provider may act in its sole discretion.
pairs.new: The Provider may act in its reasonable discretion.

pairs.old: This agreement is governed by New York law.
pairs.new: This agreement is governed by Delaware law.

pairs.old: Notice must be given within 30 days.
pairs.new: Notice must be given within 30 business days.

pairs.old: The parties shall execute this agreement.
pairs.new: The parties shall sign this agreement.

pairs.old: The Seller makes the following warranties.
pairs.new: The Seller makes the following representations and warranties.

pairs.old: No employee may disclose data.
pairs.new: No employee may disclose or share data.

pairs.old: The Provider shall deliver promptly.
pairs.new: The Provider shall deliver in a timely manner.
